summary: Verified all 4 ADAS HUD bug fixes on the cockpit route. All 18 required testids present. Ego vehicle no longer overlapped by bottom metrics panel. Lead vehicle TTC-based color coding working (red and orange variants observed within 15s window). 14 barricade circles present and actively animating (14/14 positions changed via getBoundingClientRect over 400ms). Outer road paths converge to trapezoid top corners (x=470/530) and dashed lane dividers to x=490/510. Regression clean.

issues: Ego vehicle inline style is bottom:14% (spec expected bottom:16%). Ego bottom edge (~928.8px) sits just 0.7px above bottom-metrics top (~929.5px). No visual overlap, but the ego rear is flush against the console rim; consider raising to bottom:16% for a small breathing gap as specified.

bug1_ego_road_above_console.status: PASS (no overlap) - minor: ego bottom is 14% not 16% per spec

bug2_lead_ttc_color.note: TTC drift is 2.2-3.6s so >5s branch (orange+hue-rotate) is never triggered by simulator; red (≤2.5) and orange (2.5-5) both observed as expected.

action_items: Optional: bump ego-vehicle inline style from bottom:14% to bottom:16% to match spec and add a small visual gap above the bottom-metrics panel (currently only ~0.7px clearance).
critical_code_review_comments: Ego vehicle bottom position deviates from the review spec (14% vs 16%). While no overlap occurs, at slightly taller ego images or different viewport aspect ratios the ego could touch the metrics console. Standardize on 16%.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cockpit at '/' with viewport 1920x1080. Lead vehicle image swaps between samelane_vehicle_red.png and samelane_vehicle_orange.png based on hud.ttc from useHudState (drift 2.2-3.6s). Hue-rotate branch (>5s) is unreachable via current simulator; if you need to verify it, temporarily raise TTC in useHudState.js. Barricade circles use SMIL animate; use getBoundingClientRect (not getAttribute cx) to observe motion.
